task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Projects' workspace in the Nuxeo Platform.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo web interface displays the 'Projects' workspace, showing a list of documents including 'Annual Report 2023', 'Project Proposal', and 'Q3 Status Report'.
The screen shows the document view or management tab specifically for 'Annual Report 2023'.
The agent clicks an 'Unlock' button, and/or the padlock icon previously associated with 'Annual Report 2023' is no longer visible.
The screen shows the document view or management tab specifically for 'Project Proposal'.
The agent clicks an 'Unlock' button, and/or the padlock icon previously associated with 'Project Proposal' is no longer visible.

task_completion.description: Ensure the 'Q3 Status Report' remains locked by the Administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Q3 Status Report' is visible in the document list or its own view, and it still displays a padlock icon indicating it remains locked.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo graphical user interface to unlock the documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks and navigation within the Nuxeo web interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts being executed.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Nuxeo Platform.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser displays the genuine Nuxeo Platform interface with the correct workspace and document titles, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent selectively unlocked only the required documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent specifically targeted 'Annual Report 2023' and 'Project Proposal' for unlocking, rather than running a bulk unlock operation that would affect 'Q3 Status Report'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target workspace is '/default-domain/workspaces/Projects'. There are three documents: 'Annual-Report-2023' (File) and 'Project-Proposal' (File) are initially locked by 'jsmith' and must be unlocked (worth 40 points each in the backend verifier). 'Q3-Status-Report' (Note) is initially locked by 'Administrator' and must remain locked (worth 20 points). The final state should show no lock icons for the first two documents, but a lock icon must remain for 'Q3-Status-Report'.
